title: lolium temulentum subsp. cuneatum
intro: Lolium temulentum subsp. cuneatum, also known as a subspecies of the wild oat, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium temulentum subsp. cuneatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
